item.title: The House Hot Sheet for Week 4 of the 2025 Legislative Session – Washington State House Democrats

item.title: 👍Terri Fletcher - Sea Hawkers Organization
item.description: Terri Fletcher signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Sea Hawkers Organization.

item.description: Lucy Aragon signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Myself.

item.description: Roberto Reyes signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Fan.
